title: aphaca vulgaris
intro: Aphaca vulgaris, also known as the common or field orache, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Aphaca vulgaris include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for rheumatism and other joint-related problems. Aphaca vulgaris is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in herbal infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
